assertions.title: Policies view shows Signer Policies with per-method rules and Peer Policies with permission badges

steps.action: Open dashboard and click header Policies button
steps.expected: Policies view renders with Signer Policies and Peer Policies panels
steps.observed: Policies view rendered at dashboard URL with both panels visible

steps.expected: Signer panel shows default policy selector + per-method rules; peer panel shows SIGN/ECDH/PING/ONBOARD badges
steps.observed: Signer panel showed default selector and rules (sign_event:1, nip44_encrypt, get_public_key, primal.net); Peer panel showed 3 peers with SIGN/ECDH/PING/ONBOARD badges

evidence.consoleErrors: none (agent-browser errors returned no entries during this flow)
evidence.network: agent-browser network requests: No requests captured (client-side UI route/state transitions only)

assertions.title: Signer Policy Prompt modal shows request details, peer info, and 6 action buttons (Deny through Always deny)

steps.observed: Signer Policy modal opened over dashboard with backdrop

steps.expected: Request badge, peer info, metadata table, expiration timer, and 6 action buttons in 3 rows
steps.observed: Modal showed SIGN badge, Peer #2 + pubkey + domain, EVENT KIND/CONTENT/PUBKEY/DOMAIN rows, Expires in 42s, and six buttons: Deny, Allow once, Always allow, Always for kind:1, Always deny for kind:1, Always deny for primal.net

evidence.consoleErrors: none (agent-browser errors returned no entries during this flow)
evidence.network: agent-browser network requests: No requests captured (modal interaction was local UI state)

assertions.title: Signing Failed modal shows error details, code box, Dismiss and Retry buttons

steps.observed: Signing Failed modal opened over dashboard with backdrop

steps.expected: Red error icon, title, description, technical code/detail box, Dismiss and Retry
steps.observed: Modal showed red error icon, Signing Failed title, failure description, monospace technical detail box, and Dismiss/Retry footer buttons

evidence.consoleErrors: none (agent-browser errors returned no entries during this flow)
evidence.network: agent-browser network requests: No requests captured (modal interaction was local UI state)

assertions.title: Modal overlays dismiss correctly (close button, action buttons all close modal)

steps.action: Policy Prompt dismissal via X and actions
steps.expected: X, Deny, and Allow once each close the modal and remove backdrop
steps.observed: Policy Prompt closed successfully via Close (X), Deny, and Allow once; post-action screenshots show dashboard without modal/backdrop

steps.action: Signing Failed dismissal via X and actions
steps.expected: X, Dismiss, and Retry each close the modal and remove backdrop
steps.observed: Signing Failed closed successfully via Close (X), Dismiss, and Retry; post-action screenshots show dashboard without modal/backdrop

steps.expected: Dashboard remains interactive once modal closes
steps.observed: Header controls and modal trigger buttons remained available after each dismissal

evidence.consoleErrors: none (agent-browser errors returned no entries during dismissal checks)
evidence.network: agent-browser network requests: No requests captured (all checks were modal UI state transitions)

assertions.title: Cycling through all dashboard states and modals produces no console errors

steps.action: Cycle Mock State through Running, Connecting, Stopped, All Relays Offline, Signing Blocked, then back to Running
steps.expected: State transitions complete without crashes or unhandled errors
steps.observed: All five states switched successfully via dropdown in-session with no visible breakage

steps.action: Open and close Policy Prompt and Signing Failed during the cycle
steps.expected: Modals continue to function and close cleanly
steps.observed: Policy Prompt and Signing Failed both opened and closed successfully during the cycle

steps.action: Inspect browser error log at end of full cycle

evidence.consoleErrors: none (agent-browser errors returned no entries after full cycle)
evidence.network: agent-browser network requests: No requests captured

frictions.description: To reach dashboard from a clean context, Finish Distribution stayed disabled until each remote package was marked distributed via QR modal. Copy clicks alone were insufficient in this headless run.
frictions.resolution: Opened both package QR modals and clicked Done for each, then completed distribution and navigated to dashboard.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request capture returned 'No requests captured' during these dashboard state/modal checks.
frictions.resolution: Used screenshot + URL + console error evidence as primary proof for these client-side interactions.

summary: Tested 5 assigned assertions (VAL-DASH-006, 008, 009, 010, 012): all 5 passed in isolated session 2e2d7b0a2b34__u3 at http://127.0.0.1:5173, with no console errors observed.
